The '''Danchaf''', also called '''tree goblins''' by the [[Jenet/Legends|Jenets]], were predatory pack animals which originated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garban]]. Growing to about a couple of [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall, the [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]-build Danchaf were climbing creatures that possessed clawed feet and broad shoulders protected by scales with horn-like protrusions. [[Xenobiologist/Legends|Xenobiologists]] identified the goblins as [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], although the Jenet argued that the creatures' abilities in problem-solving and reasoning manifested themselves when the offworld observers were not present. This belief was heightened more by Jenet legends that told of a [[Time/Legends|time]] when the Danchaf ruled the world and were only driven back by the warriors of the Jenet.<ref name="CG" />
